name: pi-essentials
description: Personal pack of Pi coding-agent extensions. First-party-quality tools that keep context clean. Currently ships a context-safe fetch tool.

scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --lib es2022 --types node fetch.ts fetch.test.ts types/turndown-plugin-gfm.d.ts
